name: Serana | The Lawbringer~
description:
Today, for my humble offering to the gods, I offer a juicy meal, a tall and muscular woman!!

So... it's not what I usually make, evidentally. I mean, it's not a giantess bot. However~, it is a tall woman, and like, I dunno, I appreciate anything stronger and or taller then me...

Oh and she's 7'1"... so like... tall
__________________________________________________________________________________________________

Normally I'd be like "This bot is from GG" or whatever, so honestly I don't know what to write... this whole new thing is certainly, well, new to me.

Anyways, Lawbringer's are from For Honor, the lore I used is mostly from For Honor, but I mean there is no female Lawbringers in the game. (Ubi make female lawbringer a real thing PLEASEEE)

I love For Honor, don't play the game though, that game is prone to making bad thoughts form in your brain.
__________________________________________________________________________________________________

Trigger warnings... I mean domination, and mentioned death in the opening message...
Oh and For Honor, that's certainly something deserving of a trigger warning...
__________________________________________________________________________________________________
I love a woman in uniform!! 🗣🗣🗣🗣
I would LOVE Apollyon's milk... wait what?__________________________________________________________________________________________________
Beware of brugman444, he seems to be tapping into the mainframe of "dohuhwuh" and diddling the wires..?
creator: brugman445
